author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Build C9.1 conformance suite for ferrotorch-nn basic layers following the 4-layer architecture from docs/conformance-suites.md.

Layer 1: Full surface inventory at ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/_surface_inventory.toml — all 11 in-scope modules (linear, conv, lazy_linear, lazy_conv, lazy_conv_transpose, embedding, identity, padding, upsample, pooling, dropout).

Layer 2: Reference fixtures via scripts/regenerate_nn_layers_fixtures.py pinned to torch==2.11.0. One fixture set per layer: small input, manual_seed=42 weight init, forward output captured.

Layer 3: conformance_nn_layers.rs integration test covering all 11 modules. Cascade-skip pattern for any divergences found.

Layer 4: DEFER to C9.4 per spec.

Dev deps serde_json and toml will be added to ferrotorch-nn/Cargo.toml if not present.
